tool_args.code:
from datetime import datetime
date = datetime(2026, 3, 26)
weekday = date.strftime('%A')
print(f"Today is {weekday}")
if weekday in ['Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday']:
    days = 2
elif weekday == 'Sunday':
    days = 3
elif weekday == 'Monday':
    days = 4
print(f"DAYS={days}")
